---
title: "For Fun"
description: "Personal projects inspired by games, travel, and curiosity."
listing:
  contents:
    - ../league/index.qmd
    - ../mario/index.qmd
    - ../NLP and Jeopardy/index.qmd
    - ../Pokemon Dashboard/index.qmd
    - ../Settlers of Catan/index.qmd
    - ../travel/index.qmd
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [image, title, description]
  image-height: 220px
  page-size: 12
---

Experiments, hobbies, and adventures I explore for the fun of it.
